Comfortable Accommodations: Albergo Ristorante Stazione Cavaglia in Cavaglia offers family rooms with balconies, mountain views, and parquet floors. Each room includes a sofa bed, wardrobe, and hairdryer.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves local cuisine with vegetarian, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Guests can enjoy lunch and dinner in a traditional ambience. A buffet breakfast includes juice, cheese, and fruits.
Leisure Facilities: The hotel features a sun terrace, garden, and outdoor seating area. Free WiFi is available in public areas. Additional amenities include a coffee shop, bicycle parking, and tour desk.

Comfortable Accommodations: Al Crott in Poschiavo offers comfortable rooms with private bathrooms, tea and coffee makers, hairdryers, free toiletries, showers, and TVs. Each room includes a dining area, work desk, and wardrobe.
